text: I stopped going to the gym for 2 months. Now I'm back and it hurts. But I'm not just fighting for a better body, I'm fighting for the discipline to chase my dreams, no matter the pain or sacrifice.
decision_reason: meets all requirements and has a clear, relatable narrative

text: It's okay to struggle with getting back on track. I'm right there with you, trying to fix my sleep schedule and get back to the gym. Every small step towards our goals requires sacrifice, but it's worth it for the progress, no matter how slow.
decision_reason: meets all requirements and provides a relatable, empathetic perspective
